parameters.content:
## User-End

Form submission triggers the workflow

## Sales OP/ Intern

* Monitors incoming submissions
* Check email validity

## Bussiness Analyst

* Enrich Lead
* Get's Company Validity
* Purify Data

## Sales OP/ Intern

* Check if lead is already client or not
* Categorizes the lead based on its purity
* Contact with the respective department based on lead condition

## Content Coordinater

* If lead is high or medium value creates its PDF.
* Place the lead's pdf with his/her biography in Goggle drive.

## Sales Manager

* Contacting with the lead.
* Send message to executive
* Following up the lead

parameters.message:

Sould we make it our count or not?

=Hye Content Cordinator!

A {{ $json.lead_value }}_valued lead reach to us via {{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Source:'] }}.

{{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Name:'] }} from {{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Company:'] }} wants service of {{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Service:'] }} from us. We need to contact him/her.

Contact : {{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Contact:'] }}
Email : {{ $('On lead entry').item.json['Email:'] }}

Regards,
    Sales Ops Team
